assertions.description: HTMLAnchorElement.attributionSrc is the registration surface affected by debug reporting.
navigator.cookieEnabled is exposed because debug mode depends on cookie availability.
document.hasStorageAccess is exposed for the third-party cookie privacy regime debug mode interacts with.
A same-site ar_debug cookie can be set and cleared by normal cookie mechanics.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{document.cookie='ar_debug=1; SameSite=Lax; Max-Age=60; path=/';const ok=document.cookie.includes('ar_debug=1');document.cookie='ar_debug=; Max-Age=0; path=/';return ok;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: Headers accepts Attribution-Reporting-Register-Trigger payloads that can contain debug reporting fields.
